text:
26.03.2013 21:45, rm@FreeBSD.org Ð¿Ð¸ÑÐµÑ:
> Synopsis: devel/py-distribute fails to install some files
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: rm
> State-Changed-When: Tue Mar 26 19:45:33 UTC 2013
> State-Changed-Why:
> Hi Volodymyr, is this still the case? We have a local patch with current
> distribute in ports that should prevent such a breakage.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=168980

I think it definitely wouldn't manifest the same way and the bug can be 
closed.

Right now with each py-distribute update I have to fix easy-install.pth 
by hand as port instead of updating it just installs 
easy-install.pth.dist. I'm not sure that this bug still persists. Anyway 
next update will sort the things out.

-- 
Sphinx of black quartz, judge my vow.
